d:T62a,data:image/png;base64,:Ta10,<p><span data-contrast="auto">Contact Energy is one of New Zealand&rsquo;s largest energy retailers and generators, supplying electricity, natural gas, broadband, mobile and LPG to over 650,000 customers across the country.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Contact Energy generates electricity from a diverse portfolio of renewable and thermal sources, including hydroelectric, geothermal and thermal power stations. Its hydro and geothermal assets play a major role in supporting New Zealand&rsquo;s shift towards a lower carbon energy future.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Contact Energy also supports customers with solar panels, through a solar buy-back programme, allowing households with grid-tied solar PV systems to sell excess electricity back to the grid.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Contact Energy is listed on the NZX and ASX.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Contact Energy offers a range of flexible plans designed to suit different household needs. It also offers dual fuel options for both piped and bottled gas users, along with bundles for mobile and broadband. The company focuses on providing reliable service, renewable energy options and has a commitment to sustainability.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">You will need a smart meter to sign up for certain services, such as solar buyback.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">For more information, see the </span><a href="https://contact.co.nz/residential"><span data-contrast="none">Contact Energy website</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>f:T482,<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="9" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Some plans have discounts for dual fuel and bundling utilities.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="9" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Free power 9pm to midnight, or 9am to 5pm on weekends on selected plans.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>10:T73b,<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="8" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="none">Electricityâ€¯</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="8" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="none">Gas &ndash; both reticulated (piped natural gas) and bottled gas (LPG)&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></li>

<h3><span data-ccp-props="{}">Complaints</span></h3>
<p><span data-contrast="none">If you have a customer complaint, contact Contact Energy as soon as possible by:</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="16" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">email (</span><a href="mailto:help@contact.co.nz"><span data-contrast="none">help@contactenergy.co.nz</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">)&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="16" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">phone (0800 80 9000 for residential customers)&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="16" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="3" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">post (Contact Energy Limited, PO Box 624, Wellington 6140).</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="none">If your complaint isn&rsquo;t resolved or you aren&rsquo;t satisfied with the solution, contactâ€¯</span><a href="https://www.udl.co.nz/en/"><span data-contrast="none">Utility Disputes Limited</span></a><span data-contrast="none">.â€¯â€¯</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<h3><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102534689 BCX0">Vulnerable </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102534689 BCX0">and </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102534689 BCX0">m</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102534689 BCX0">edically</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102534689 BCX0"> </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102534689 BCX0">d</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102534689 BCX0">ependent </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102534689 BCX0">c</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW102534689 BCX0">ustomers</span></h3>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Electricity retailers are required to meet mandatory consumer care standards. </span><a href="https://www.ea.govt.nz/your-power/consumer-care-obligations/"><span data-contrast="none">Learn more at the Electricty Authority's Consumer Care Obligations webpage</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">If you have been verified as medically dependent, Contact Energy will not disconnect your power supply for unpaid bills</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">If you are vulnerable and you are struggling to pay your bills, talk to Contact Energy&rsquo;s customer service team about payment options.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">For more information, see </span><a href="https://contact.co.nz/support/care"><span data-contrast="none">Contact Energy&rsquo;s consumer care policy</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"></span></p>14:Ta90,<p><span data-contrast="auto">On the Contact app, you can see short term usage, as well as data of your electricity consumption for up to 15 months. You can also see this information if you log in on the website.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Request up to the last 24 months of your electricity consumption data (that is, the amount of power you used). This information can help you understand your electricity usage habits and make informed decisions when choosing a power plan for your household.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Choose to request either:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="15" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">a summarised report - the consumption data recorded on each of your bills or</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="15" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">a detailed report - the consumption data in its most detailed format</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">The amount of data provided will depend on the period you are requesting for, the type of meter and how often the meter was read, for example, if you have a smart meter, your data may include 15-minute-interval readings. We recommend requesting a summarised report due to the volume of information you could receive in a detailed report.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><b><span data-contrast="auto">Email:â€¯ </span></b><a href="mailto:getdata@contactenergy.co.nz"><span data-contrast="none">getdata@contactenergy.co.nz</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>

up to the last 24 months of your electricity consumption data (i.e. the amount of power you used). This information can help you understand your electricity usage habits and make informed decisions when choosing a power plan for your household.\r\n\r\nChoose to request either:\r\n\r\n- a summarised report - the consumption data recorded on each of your bills, or\r\n- a detailed report - the consumption data in its most detailed format\r\n\r\nThe amount of data provided will depend on the period you are requesting for, the type of meter, and how often the meter was read, e.g. if you have a smart meter, your data may include 15-minute interval readings. Climate positive certified means Ecotricity measures the carbon footprint of its entire value chain and reduces these emissions by setting and achieving science-aligned reduction targets. Ecotricity then offsets remaining emissions at 125% to go beyond neutrality, and contributes a further 75% of its carbon footprint by supporting local environmental and social projects.\r\n\r\nUnlike many other retailers, Ecotricity offers contracts with a 3-year energy price freeze.\r\n\r\nOffers buy back power from grid-tied solar PV systems.  &quot;,&quot;products&quot;:&quot;Electricity only.&quot;,&quot;billingOptions&quot;:&quot;* Monthly\r\n* Direct debit\r\n* Online payment\r\n\r\nBill types: \r\n\r\n* Paper\r\n* Email\r\n* Web&quot;,&quot;rewards&quot;:&quot;-&quot;,&quot;complaints&quot;:&quot;Complain to your retailer first. If your complaint isn't resolved, ask [Utilities Disputes](http://www.utilitiesdisputes.co.nz/) to consider your complaint.&quot;,&quot;greenInitiatives&quot;:&quot;Ecotricity only contracts with hydro, wind and solar generation and is New Zealand's only provider of Climate Positive Certified electricity.&quot;,&quot;advancedSwitch&quot;:true,&quot;advancedSwitchEmail&quot;:&quot;bring.change@ecotricity.co.nz&quot;,&quot;requiresSmartMeter&quot;:false,&quot;smartMeterInstaller&quot;:false,&quot;switchUrl&quot;:&quot;https://onboarding.ecotricity.co.nz/Form/Index/4/onboarding&quot;,&quot;supported&quot;:true,&quot;eaTraderCode&quot;:&quot;ECOT&quot;,&quot;additionalTraderCodes&quot;:&quot;&quot;,&quot;slug&quot;:&quot;ecotricity&quot;,&quot;metaTitle&quot;:null,&quot;metaDescription&quot;:null}">

<div class="wrapper-inner">
<div class="retailer">
<div class="retailer-sections">
<div class="mb2 mb3-netbook">
<div id="planDetails" role="region" aria-labelledby="planDetails" class="accordion-panel richtext mb2">
<div class="flex fd-column">
<div class="retailer-section retailer-greenInitiatives pt2">
<p>Ecotricity is New Zealand's only Climate Positive Certified electricity and matches its customers&rsquo; electricity consumption with 100% renewable energy sources.&nbsp;</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>17:T404,<p><strong>Instructions</strong></p>
<p>Request up to the last 24 months of your electricity consumption data (i.e. the amount of power you used). This information can help you understand your electricity usage habits and make informed decisions when choosing a power plan for your household.</p>
<p>Choose to request either:</p>
<ul>
  <li>a summarised report - the consumption data recorded on each of your bills, or</li>
  <li>a detailed report - the consumption data in its most detailed format</li>
</ul>
<p>The amount of data provided will depend on the period you are requesting for, the type of meter, and how often the meter was read, e.g. if you have a smart meter, your data may include 15-minute interval readings. We recommend requesting a summarised report due to the volume of information you could receive in a detailed report.</p>
<p><strong>Email </strong><a href="mailto:bring.change@ecotricity.co.nz">bring.change@ecotricity.co.nz</a><br /><strong>Phone </strong><a href="url:0800845000">0800 845 000</a></p>18:T901,<ul>
<li data-leveltext="â—" data-font="Noto Sans Symbols" data-listid="4" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Noto Sans Symbols&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;â—&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">All Electric Kiwi customers receive a free hour of power during an elected off-peak period every day. You can use as much power as you like during this hour without being charged.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559685&quot;:360,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559685&quot;:360,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}"></span></li>
<li data-leveltext="â—" data-font="Noto Sans Symbols" data-listid="4" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Noto Sans Symbols&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;â—&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1"><span data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody">All Electric Kiwi plans (excluding the Everyday plan) offer cheaper off-peak power, with weekends included as off-peak. To maximise your savings, you should shift as much electricity as you can to off-peak periods.&nbsp;</span></li>
<li data-leveltext="â—" data-font="Noto Sans Symbols" data-listid="4" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Noto Sans Symbols&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;â—&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="3" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">There are no contracts and no leaving or joining fees for any power or broadband plan.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559685&quot;:360,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>19:T77e,<p><span data-contrast="auto">Electric Kiwi offers:&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="7" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="5" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Electricity.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></li>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="7" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="6" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Broadband.&nbsp;</span></li>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="7" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="6" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Mobile.&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">It does not offer gas.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>1a:Tee5,<p aria-level="1"><b><span data-contrast="auto">Live chat:</span></b><span data-contrast="auto"> Contact Electric Kiwi through its website and app, open on business days from 8am to 10pm, and weekends from 10am to 8pm.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:240,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p aria-level="1"><span></span><b><span data-contrast="auto">Phone:</span></b><span data-contrast="auto"> Request a call back from the contact centre team by filling in a form on its website. You should receive a call back on a weekday between 9am-5pm.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><b><span data-contrast="auto">Email: </span></b><a href="mailto:info@electrickiwi.co.nz"><span data-contrast="none">info@electrickiwi.co.nz</span></a><span data-contrast="auto"> or submit a message form on Electric Kiwi&rsquo;s website; you should get an email response within 2 business days.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><b><span data-contrast="auto">Social:</span></b><span data-contrast="auto"> You can also send Electric Kiwi a message on Facebook.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<h4><b><span data-contrast="auto">Complaints&nbsp;</span></b><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">If you have a customer complaint, contact Electric Kiwi as soon as possible; its customer service team will aim to resolve your issue within 20 business days or redirect your complaint to the appropriate team.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">If your complaint isn&rsquo;t resolved or you aren&rsquo;t satisfied with the solution, contact </span><a href="https://www.udl.co.nz/en/"><span data-contrast="none">Utility Disputes Limited</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<h4><b><span data-contrast="auto">Vulnerable and medically dependent consumers</span></b><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Electric Kiwi will not disconnect the power supply for unpaid bills for customers that have been verified as medically dependent.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">For customers that have been verified as vulnerable, </span><a href="https://www.electrickiwi.co.nz/legal/customer-care-policy/"><span data-contrast="none">Electric Kiwi has a vulnerable customer procedure</span></a><span data-contrast="auto"> where customers are genuinely unable to pay.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody">Electricity retailers are required to meet mandatory consumer care standards. <a href="https://www.ea.govt.nz/your-power/consumer-care-obligations/">Learn more here.&nbsp;</a></span></p>
<p aria-level="1"><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:240,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>1b:T7ed,<p><span data-contrast="auto">You can access your usage data via the Electric Kiwi app or the customer portal on Electric Kiwi&rsquo;s website.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">You can also email </span><a href="mailto:info@electrickiwi.co.nz"><span data-contrast="none">info@electrickiwi.co.nz</span></a><span data-contrast="auto"> to request up to the last 24 months of your electricity consumption data.&nbsp; You can choose either:</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
  <li data-leveltext="â—" data-font="Noto Sans Symbols" data-listid="1" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Noto Sans Symbols&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;â—&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">a summarised report - the consumption data recorded on each of your bills, or</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></li>
  <li data-leveltext="â—" data-font="Noto Sans Symbols" data-listid="1" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Noto Sans Symbols&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;â—&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">a detailed report - the consumption data in its most detailed format.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>1c:Tb09,<p><span data-contrast="auto" xml:lang="EN-GB" lang="EN-GB" class="TextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0">All Electric Kiwi plans incentiv</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0">ise</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0"> power consumption during the times of day where it is more likely the </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0">electricity</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0"> </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0">consumed </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0">comes from renewable generation. </span></span><span class="LineBreakBlob BlobObject DragDrop SCXW90020967 BCX0"><span class="SCXW90020967 BCX0">&nbsp;</span><br class="SCXW90020967 BCX0" /></span><span data-contrast="auto" xml:lang="EN-GB" lang="EN-GB" class="TextRun EmptyTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0"></span><span class="LineBreakBlob BlobObject DragDrop SCXW90020967 BCX0"><span class="SCXW90020967 BCX0">&nbsp;</span><br class="SCXW90020967 BCX0" /></span><span data-contrast="auto" xml:lang="EN-GB" lang="EN-GB" class="TextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0">Electric Kiwi are trialling </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0">new technology</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0"> to automate hot water cylinders to heat water during off-peak times. This may save customers money, but it also increases the likelihood that the power that comes from renewable sources. </span></span><span class="LineBreakBlob BlobObject DragDrop SCXW90020967 BCX0"><span class="SCXW90020967 BCX0"><span data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody">Please note - this is only available to eligible customers with specific meter types within supported networks.&nbsp;</span></span><br class="SCXW90020967 BCX0" /></span><span data-contrast="auto" xml:lang="EN-GB" lang="EN-GB" class="TextRun EmptyTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0"></span><span class="LineBreakBlob BlobObject DragDrop SCXW90020967 BCX0"><span class="SCXW90020967 BCX0">&nbsp;</span><br class="SCXW90020967 BCX0" /></span><span data-contrast="auto" xml:lang="EN-GB" lang="EN-GB" class="TextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0">Additionally, Electric Kiwi provides a &ldquo;Green Meter&rdquo; tool to help </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0">customers</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0"> understand the predicted &ldquo;greenness&rdquo; of the grid at any given time. This is available </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0">as an</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW90020967 BCX0"> app or on its website.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW90020967 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>1d:T6c5,<p><span data-contrast="auto">Genesis is one of New Zealand&rsquo;s largest energy retailers and generators. Genesis supplies electricity, gas and LPG. Genesis serves over 650,000 customers nationwide.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Genesis owns and operates a diverse range of generation assets, including hydro, wind and thermal power stations. Its generation portfolio enables it to contribute significantly to New Zealand&rsquo;s overall electricity supply, with a mix of renewable and non-renewable sources.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">The New Zealand Government holds a 51% shareholding in Genesis Energy, with the remaining shares publicly listed on the New Zealand stock exchange (NZX). </span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Genesis is headquartered in Auckland, with customer service and operations teams based throughout New Zealand.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">For more information, see the </span><a href="https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/"><span data-contrast="none">Genesis website</span></a><span data-contrast="none">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:false,&quot;134233118&quot;:false,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559738&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>1e:Tb86,<p data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody">Genesis offers a &lsquo;Home bundle reward&rsquo; where you sign up for electricity and at least one other fuel on the same account.&nbsp;<span>&nbsp;</span><span lang="en-NZ">If eligible can get $10 monthly credit on your bill if you combine natural gas and electricity on one bill. Or get $15 credit per bottle delivered when you have LPG bottled gas and electricity on one bill.&nbsp;<span>&nbsp;</span><a originalsrc="https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/for-home/products/home-bundle-rewards" data-auth="NotApplicable" href="https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/for-home/products/home-bundle-rewards" data-linkindex="0" title="Original URL: https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/for-home/products/home-bundle-rewards. Click or tap if you trust this link.">See here for the full details</a>.</span></p>
<h3><b>Special offers</b></h3>
<ul>
<li>Eligible customers get &lsquo;Power Shouts&rsquo; - free electricity with you deciding when is best to use it.
<ul>
<li>50 PowerShout hours when you join their electricity PowerHome plan.</li>
<li>50 PowerShout hours on your electricity account in addition to a $15 credit whenever an LPG bottle is delivered when you bundle your electricity with your LPG on the same account.</li>
<li>50 PowerShout hours on your electricity account in addition to a $10 a month credit on your account when you bundle your electricity with your gas on the same account.&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Eligible EV customers get a 50% discount on their variable household electricity rates from 9pm to 7am. Night rates on the Energy EV plan apply between the hours of 9pm &ndash; 7am, 7 days a week and only to the Genesis variable rates portion of your plan. The Energy EV plan night rates are 50% lower than the day rates. Night rates do not apply to the daily fixed portion of your plan or to any appliances under a controlled meter configuration. For full pricing information complete the application form and we will be in touch with you to confirm the details for your meter and network.&nbsp;<a originalsrc="https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/terms/energy-ev-plan-terms" data-auth="NotApplicable" href="https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/terms/energy-ev-plan-terms" data-linkindex="1" title="Original URL: https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/terms/energy-ev-plan-terms. Click or tap if you trust this link.">Read the full terms here</a>.</li>
<li>Free fibre modem when you stay with Genesis for 12 months.
<ul>
<li>Note: Free TP-Link HB410 Wi-Fi 7 System. $15 shipping and handling fee applies. Modem repayment required if you end plan in first 12 months.&nbsp;<a originalsrc="https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/terms#broadband" data-auth="NotApplicable" href="https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/terms#broadband" data-linkindex="2" title="Original URL: https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/terms#broadband. Click or tap if you trust this link.">See here for their full terms and conditions.</a></li>
</ul>
</li>

</ul>21:Td73,<p><span style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;"><span>Genesis provides a range of customer support options. See the available options at <a href="https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/help">Genesis Energy contact and support</a>.&nbsp;</span></span></p>
<h3><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">Complaints</span></h3>
<p>If you have a complaint, contact Genesis Energy as soon as possible. Its customer service team will work to resolve your issue promptly. You can <a href="https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/help/our-resolution-process">view its resolution process here</a>.&nbsp;</p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">If your energy complaint isn&rsquo;t resolved or you aren&rsquo;t satisfied with the solution, contactâ€¯</span><a href="https://www.udl.co.nz/en/"><span data-contrast="none">Utility Disputes Limited</span></a><span data-contrast="none">.â€¯â€¯</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<h3><span data-contrast="auto" xml:lang="EN-NZ" lang="EN-NZ" class="TextRun Highlight SCXW190555632 BCX0"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW190555632 BCX0">Vulnerable </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW190555632 BCX0">and </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW190555632 BCX0">m</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW190555632 BCX0">edically</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW190555632 BCX0"> </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW190555632 BCX0">d</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW190555632 BCX0">ependent </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW190555632 BCX0">c</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW190555632 BCX0">ustomers&nbsp;</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW190555632 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3>
<p><span data-contrast="none">Genesis will not disconnect the power supply for unpaid bills for customers who have been verified as medically dependent.</span><span data-contrast="none">â€¯</span><span data-contrast="none">â€¯</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">If you are medically dependent or experiencing difficulty paying your bills, support from </span><a href="https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/help/consumer-care"><span data-contrast="none">Genesis Consumer care</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">Electricity retailers are required to meet mandatory consumer care standards.â€¯</span><a href="https://www.ea.govt.nz/your-power/consumer-care-obligations/"><span data-contrast="none">Learn more at the Electricty Authority's Consumer Care Obligations webpage.</span></a><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>

<p><a href="https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/help">Contact Genesis</a> to request up to the last 24 months of your electricity consumption data. <span data-contrast="auto">You can choose either:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>

<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="3" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">a summarised report &ndash; the consumption data recorded on each of your bills or</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li>

</ul>23:T545,<p>Genesis operates across various regions of Aotearoa, including areas with significant natural and community value. The company manages its environmental and social impacts through its <a href="https://www.genesisenergy.co.nz/about/sustainability/our-framework">Sustainability Framework</a>.</p>
<p>The framework is based on 3 principles: partnerships, positive outcomes and place-based approaches focused on local communities and environments.</p>
<p><strong>Planet: Climate and nature</strong></p>
<p>Genesis is working to reduce its emissions, support customers to do the same and improve environmental outcomes in the areas where it operates. The company contributes to the development of a low-carbon energy system powered by renewable sources.</p>
<p><strong>People: More equal society </strong></p>
<p>Genesis promotes access to affordable and reliable energy, energy wellbeing and warm homes, while also aiming to maintain a healthy, diverse and inclusive workforce.</p>
<p><strong>Profit: Sustainable business </strong></p>
<p>Genesis reports transparently on its progress towards sustainability goals and collaborates with other organisations to support positive change.</p>
<p>Genesis has committed to a science-based target of reaching net zero emissions by 2040, in line with New Zealand&rsquo;s national goal of net zero by 2050.</p>24:T53e,data:image/png;base64,:T612,data:image/png;base64,:T6a6,<table border="1" style="border-collapse: collapse;">

<p>Email: <a href="mailto:hello@hanergy.nz">hello@hanergy.nz</a> â€¯â€¯&nbsp;</p>
<p>Phone: 0800 199 188â€¯â€¯&nbsp;</p>
<p>Online: &nbsp;<a href="https://hanergy.nz/help-center/support/">https://hanergy.nz/help-center/support/</a></p>
<p>If your complaint isn&rsquo;t resolved or you aren&rsquo;t satisfied with the solution, contactâ€¯<a href="https://www.udl.co.nz/en/">Utility Disputes Limited.</a>â€¯â€¯â€¯&nbsp;</p>
<p><strong>Vulnerableâ€¯andâ€¯medicallyâ€¯dependentâ€¯customers&nbsp;</strong></p>
<p>Electricity retailers are required to meet mandatory consumer care standards.â€¯Learn more at the Electricity Authority's <a href="https://www.ea.govt.nz/your-power/consumer-care-obligations/">Consumer Care Obligations webpage.â€¯&nbsp;</a></p>
<p>If you have been verified as medically dependent, Hanergy will not disconnect your power supply for unpaid billsâ€¯&nbsp;</p>
<p>If you are vulnerable and you are struggling to pay your bills, talk to Hanergy about payment options.â€¯&nbsp;</p>
<p>For more information, see Hanergy&rsquo;s <a href="https://hanergy.nz/terms/#Customer%20care">consumer care policy</a>.â€¯&nbsp;</p>

</table>2a:T658,<p><span data-contrast="none">Mercury is a large multi-utility retailer, offering power, gas, broadband and mobile services. They generate electricity from 100% renewable sources - hydro, geothermal and wind.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:false,&quot;134233118&quot;:false,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559738&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">Their retail operations cover residential and small to medium-sized business customers.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:false,&quot;134233118&quot;:false,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559738&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">They own their own ISP network, helping connect New Zealanders to high speed fixed and wireless broadband services.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:false,&quot;134233118&quot;:false,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559738&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">Mercury is listed on the New Zealand Stock Exchange and the Australian Stock Exchange. The New Zealand Government holds a legislated minimum 51% shareholding in the Company.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:false,&quot;134233118&quot;:false,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559738&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>2b:T1644,<p><strong>Mercury offers discounts for:&nbsp;</strong></p>

<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="12" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="3" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="none">Mercury APP</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>2e:T142f,<p><b><span data-contrast="auto">Phone</span></b><span data-contrast="auto">: 0800 101 810 (general enquiries and support from a New Zealand-based customer service team)</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><b><span data-contrast="auto">Phone:</span></b><span data-contrast="auto"> 0800 369 845 (to join Mercury or add a service) </span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><b><span data-contrast="auto">Online</span></b><span data-contrast="auto">: Help and support available.</span></p>
<p><b><span data-contrast="auto">Chatbot:</span></b><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp; Customers can also input their query to the Mercury automatic chatbot.</span></p>
<p><b><span data-contrast="auto">Mobile App:</span></b><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp; Mercury have a mobile app that can be downloaded from the Apple App Store or Google Play store. The app features usage information, account details, and bill management.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><b><span data-contrast="auto">Complaints</span></b><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>

<p><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<h3><b><span data-contrast="auto">Medically dependent consumers and payment support</span></b><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3>
<p><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-contrast="auto" xml:lang="EN-NZ" lang="EN-NZ" class="TextRun SCXW97047602 BCX0"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW97047602 BCX0">Electricity retailers are required to meet mandatory consumer care standards.</span></span></span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Contact Mercury immediately if someone in the household for reasons of age, health or disability would be at risk if power were disconnected from the property.</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">If a customer is struggling to pay their bill, Mercury offers a dedicated customer payment support service.</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-contrast="auto" xml:lang="EN-NZ" lang="EN-NZ" class="TextRun SCXW97047602 BCX0"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW97047602 BCX0">For more information, see <a href="https://www.mercury.co.nz/help-and-support/consumer-care-and-support">Mercury's Consumer Care Policy</a>.</span></span></span></p>2f:T577,<p><span data-contrast="auto">Customers can request the following information about their power usage via the Mercury app or My Account:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="15" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Monthly summary (up to 24 months)</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="15" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;multilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="2" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Daily summary (up to 12 months)</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">You can request half-hourly reads by calling 0800 101 810.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>30:T446,data:image/png;base64,:T533,<p><span data-contrast="auto">Meridian Energy is New Zealand&rsquo;s largest electricity generator.&nbsp; It owns and operates around 35% of New Zealand&rsquo;s total electricity generation capacity.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Meridian's generation is 100% from renewable sources, particularly hydroelectric power and wind energy, making it one of the leading contributors to New Zealand's renewable energy targets.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">The New Zealand government holds a majority stake of 51% in Meridian.&nbsp; The remainder&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; is publicly listed on the New Zealand Stock Exchange (NZX) and is owned by private investors, both institutional and individual.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Meridian supplies electricity to homes, businesses and farms across New Zealand and has offices in Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch and Twizel.&nbsp;</span></p>32:T7ba,<p><span data-contrast="auto">Meridian customers have access to discounts with partnering businesses:</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="o" data-font="Courier New" data-listid="17" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:1440,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Courier New&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[9675],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;o&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="2"><span data-contrast="auto">Ecostore: 15% off ecostore branded products online</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="o" data-font="Courier New" data-listid="17" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:1440,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Courier New&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[9675],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;o&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="2">OEM Audio: 10% discount on EV accessories<span data-contrast="auto" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>33:T2d13,<h4 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="auto">Billing</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></h4>

<h4 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="auto">Mobile app</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">The Meridian mobile app is available for customers to download through the Apple App or Google Play stores. Customers can view their usage and bills and manage their account information, along with finding helpful tips on how to conserve energy and save money.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}"></span><span data-contrast="auto"></span></p>
<h4 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="auto">Complaints&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">If you have a complaint, get in contact with the Meridian customer service team. Where the customer service team is unable to resolve your complaint, it will be passed to the in-house complaint resolution process team, who will work with you to come to a fair and reasonable resolution.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">If your complaint isn&rsquo;t resolved or you aren&rsquo;t satisfied with the solution, contactâ€¯</span><a href="https://www.udl.co.nz/en/"><span data-contrast="none">Utility Disputes Limited</span></a><span data-contrast="none">.â€¯â€¯</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}"></span></p>
<h4 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="auto">Vulnerable and medically dependent customers</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<p><span data-contrast="none">Meridian will not disconnect the power supply for unpaid bills for customers who have been verified as medically dependent.â€¯</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">Read more about this on the </span><a href="https://www.meridianenergy.co.nz/help/medically-dependent-or-vulnerable"><span>Meridian webpage Medically dependent customers</span></a><span data-contrast="none">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p>Electricity retailers are required to meet mandatory consumer care standards. <a href="https://www.ea.govt.nz/your-power/consumer-care-obligations/">Learn more here.</a></p>
<p></p>35:Te95,<h4 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="auto">Environmental</span></h4>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Meridian is driven to accelerate decarbonisation across New Zealand and wants to help others do the same. Specifically, it aims to help community groups across Aotearoa reduce their carbon emissions through its </span><a href="https://www.meridianenergy.co.nz/community-support/decarbonisation"><span data-contrast="none">Community Decarbonisation Fund</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Meridian is passionate about electric vehicles. It&rsquo;s building one of New Zealand&rsquo;s largest EV charging networks, </span><a href="https://zero.meridianenergy.co.nz/"><span data-contrast="none">Zero</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>

<h4><b><span data-contrast="auto">Payment types </span></b><span data-contrast="auto">include:</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}"></span></h4>

<p><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;"></span></p>3a:T2356,<p><b><span data-contrast="auto">Website chat:&nbsp;</span></b><span data-contrast="auto"> Nova&rsquo;s friendly and knowledgeable &lsquo;Greg Grover&rsquo; AI chatbot is available to assist customers on Nova&rsquo;s website and on the Nova Hub app</span><b><span data-contrast="auto">.&nbsp;</span></b><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>

<p><b><span data-contrast="auto">Website and app:</span></b><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp; Nova offers customers online account access and an app called the Nova Hub.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">The Nova Hub allows you to:&nbsp;&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="9" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">access to your energy usage data&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}"> </span></li>

<h3></h3>
<h4>Complaints</h4>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">If you have a complaint, get in contact with the Nova&rsquo;s customer service team. Where the customer service team is unable to resolve your complaint, it will be passed to the in-house Resolutions team, who will work with you to come to a fair and reasonable resolution.â€¯â€¯</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">If your complaint isn&rsquo;t resolved or you aren&rsquo;t satisfied with the solution, you can contact:</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="15" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><a href="https://www.udl.co.nz/en/"><span data-contrast="none">Utilities Disputes Limited</span></a><span data-contrast="none">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="15" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><a href="https://www.tdr.org.nz/?gad_source=1&amp;gclid=EAIaIQobChMIl8SGzfKshgMVn5RQBh3sUwUNEAAYASAAEgL-DvD_BwE" style="letter-spacing: 0px;"><span data-contrast="none">Telecommunications Dispute Resolution Scheme.</span></a><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<h3 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="none"></span></h3>
<h4 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="none">Vulnerable and medically dependent customers&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:40,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">See </span><a href="https://www.novaenergy.co.nz/terms-and-conditions/residential-customer-care-policy"><span>Nova&rsquo;s Consumer care policy.</span></a><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">Nova will not disconnect the electricity or natural gas supplies for unpaid bills for customers who have been verified as medically dependent.â€¯</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">If you or someone living with you (even for a short period) depends on electricity or natural gas to run critical medical support equipment, you should contact Nova&rsquo;s customer service team.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none">Customers that have been verified as vulnerable</span><span data-contrast="auto"> should inform Nova&rsquo;s customer service team who can provide advice on supply or payment options.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p>Electricity retailers are required to meet mandatory consumer care standards. <a href="https://www.ea.govt.nz/your-power/consumer-care-obligations/">Learn more here.&nbsp;</a></p>3b:T765,<p><span data-contrast="auto">Nova customers can view short-term usage data using their Nova Hub online account and app.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">You can also contact Nova and request up to the last 24 months of your electricity consumption data. You can choose either:</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="13" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">a summarised report&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="13" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">a detailed report.<span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>3c:T691,<ul>
<li><strong>Phone:</strong> 0800 947 867 (open Monday to Thursday, 9am to 5pm, and Friday, 9am to 4pm)</li>
<li><strong>Email:</strong> <span><a href="mailto:hello@octopusenergy.nz">hello@octopusenergy.nz</a></span></li>
</ul>
<h3><span>Complaints<br /></span></h3>
<p>Customers who have complaints should contact Octopus Energy&rsquo;s complaint team on:</p>
<ul>
<li>Phone: 0800 947 867</li>
<li>Email: <a href="mailto:help@octopusenergy.co.nz">help@octopusenergy.co.nz</a></li>
</ul>
<p>If your complaint isn&rsquo;t resolved or you aren&rsquo;t satisfied with the solution, contact&nbsp;<a href="https://www.udl.co.nz/en/">Utility Disputes Limited</a>.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p>
<h3><span>Vulnerable and medically dependent customers</span></h3>
<p>Notify Octopus Energy immediately if:</p>
<ul>
<li>someone in the household for reasons of age, health or disability would be at risk if power were disconnected from the property</li>
<li>there is trouble paying bills due to genuine financial hardship.</li>
</ul>
<p>If you have been verified as medically dependent, Octopus Energy will not disconnect your power supply for unpaid bills.&nbsp;</p>
<p>Medically dependent Octopus Energy customers must provide a medical certificate or other information to confirm their status.</p>
<p>For more information, see <span><a href="https://octopusenergy.nz/customer-care">Octopus Energy&rsquo;s customer care policy</a></span>.</p>
<p><a href="https://www.ea.govt.nz/projects/all/consumer-care-obligations/consultation/eiep4a-medically-dependent-consumer-information/">Learn more about the Electricity Authority's advice on what to do if you rely on electricity for medical reasons.</a></p>3d:T677,<table border="1" style="border-collapse: collapse;">

</table>3e:T6ca,<p><span data-contrast="auto">Powershop New Zealand is an online electricity retailer that provides energy services to residential and business customers across the country. Founded in 2009, the company offers a digital platform where consumers can manage their electricity usage, track consumption in real time and purchase power in a flexible way. Powershop operates under a model that emphasizes transparency and customer control, allowing users to select and purchase of </span><a href="https://www.powershop.co.nz/help/shop-for-power/#what-are-the-different-types-of-powerpacks"><span data-contrast="none">Powerpacks</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;469777462&quot;:[2268],&quot;469777927&quot;:[0],&quot;469777928&quot;:[1]}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Powershop does not have fixed-term contracts. There are no exit fees. Powershop are a good option for households that want total flexibility.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;469777462&quot;:[2268],&quot;469777927&quot;:[0],&quot;469777928&quot;:[1]}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">As part of Meridian Energy, Powershop plays a role in New Zealand's wider electricity sector, supplying power that is generated predominantly from renewable sources such as wind and hydroelectricity.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;469777462&quot;:[2268],&quot;469777927&quot;:[0],&quot;469777928&quot;:[1]}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Powershop has been awarded five (in 2018, 2019, 2021, 2023 and 2024) Consumer NZ </span><a href="https://www.consumer.org.nz/articles/peoples-choice"><span data-contrast="none">People's Choice awards</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.</span></p>3f:T54a,<h4 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="none">New customers</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;335559738&quot;:40,&quot;335559739&quot;:0}">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Powershop offers new customers a $150 credit, applied to their first 12 months. </span><span data-contrast="none">For more details, see the </span><a href="https://www.powershop.co.nz/terms-and-conditions/150-credit/"><span data-contrast="none">Powershop $150 Credit terms and conditions webpage</span></a><span data-contrast="none">.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<h4 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="none">Staying power</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;335559738&quot;:40,&quot;335559739&quot;:0}">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Powershop customers are eligible for a loyalty discount called Staying Power. The discount starts at 20% for new customers and increases by 1% every year, to a maximum of 25% off after five years. For more details, see the </span><a href="https://www.powershop.co.nz/help/staying-power/"><span data-contrast="none">Powershop Staying Power webpage</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="none"></span></p>40:Tee1,<h4 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="none">Billing</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;335559738&quot;:40,&quot;335559739&quot;:0}">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Powershop customers receive their bills via email or online.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<h4 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="none">Payment options</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;335559738&quot;:40,&quot;335559739&quot;:0}">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">Credit card</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">Direct debit<span data-ccp-props="{}" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">Automatic payment<span data-ccp-props="{}" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">Online banking<span data-ccp-props="{}" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">Buy now, pay later.<span data-ccp-props="{}" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>41:Tc9c,<p><span data-contrast="auto">Use the chat function on the Powershop website to talk with a staff member, Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<h4 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="none">Complaints</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;335559738&quot;:40,&quot;335559739&quot;:0}">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">Powershop will happily work with you to resolve any issue quickly. Either:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="9" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">use the chat function on the Powershop website to talk with a staff member, Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm, or&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="9" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">email:â€¯<a href="mailto:complaints@powershop.co.nz?subject=Complaint" style="letter-spacing: 0px;"><span data-contrast="auto">complaints@powershop.co.nz</span></a><span data-contrast="auto" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;">.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">If your complaint isn&rsquo;t resolved or you aren&rsquo;t satisfied with the solution, contactâ€¯</span><a href="https://www.udl.co.nz/en/"><span data-contrast="none">Utility Disputes Limited</span></a><span data-contrast="auto">.â€¯â€¯</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<h4 aria-level="3"><span data-contrast="none">Vulnerable and medically dependent customers</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;335559738&quot;:40,&quot;335559739&quot;:0}">&nbsp;</span></h4>
<p><span data-contrast="none">Powershop will not disconnect the power supply for unpaid bills for customers who have been verified as medically dependent.â€¯</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335557856&quot;:16777215}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p>Electricity retailers are required to meet mandatory consumer care standards. <a href="https://www.ea.govt.nz/your-power/consumer-care-obligations/">Learn more here.</a></p>42:Tdb4,<p><span data-contrast="auto">Powershop&rsquo;s customers can access their electricity usage data:</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;469777462&quot;:[2268],&quot;469777927&quot;:[0],&quot;469777928&quot;:[1]}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<ul>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="10" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1"><span data-contrast="auto">through the Powershop app&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;469777462&quot;:[2268],&quot;469777927&quot;:[0],&quot;469777928&quot;:[1]}"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="10" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">by contacting Powershop staff Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm, through the chat function on the Powershop website&nbsp;<span data-ccp-props="{&quot;469777462&quot;:[2268],&quot;469777927&quot;:[0],&quot;469777928&quot;:[1]}" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;"> </span></li>
<li data-leveltext="ï‚·" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="10" data-list-defn-props="{&quot;335552541&quot;:1,&quot;335559685&quot;:720,&quot;335559991&quot;:360,&quot;469769226&quot;:&quot;Symbol&quot;,&quot;469769242&quot;:[8226],&quot;469777803&quot;:&quot;left&quot;,&quot;469777804&quot;:&quot;ï‚·&quot;,&quot;469777815&quot;:&quot;hybridMultilevel&quot;}" aria-setsize="-1" data-aria-posinset="1" data-aria-level="1">by emailing <a href="mailto:info@powershop.co.nz" style="letter-spacing: 0px;"><span data-contrast="none">info@powershop.co.nz</span></a><span data-contrast="auto" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;">.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;469777462&quot;:[2268],&quot;469777927&quot;:[0],&quot;469777928&quot;:[1]}" style="background-color: transparent; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-style: inherit; font-variant-ligatures: inherit; font-variant-caps: inherit; font-weight: inherit; letter-spacing: 0px;">&nbsp;</span></li>
</ul>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">You can request up to the last 24 months of your electricity usage data if you&rsquo;ve been with Powershop for this amount of time. Otherwise, you&rsquo;ll need to contact your previous retailer for your usage data for the period when you weren&rsquo;t a Powershop customer.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;469777462&quot;:[2268],&quot;469777927&quot;:[0],&quot;469777928&quot;:[1]}">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p><span data-contrast="auto">You can ask for either a summarised or detailed report.&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;469777462&quot;:[2268],&quot;469777927&quot;:[0],&quot;469777928&quot;:[1]}">&nbsp;</span></p>43:T47e,data:image/png;base64,:T474,<table border="1" style="border-collapse: collapse;">

</table>45:T408,<p><strong>Instructions</strong></p>
<p>Request up to the last 24 months of your electricity consumption data (i.e. the amount of power you used). This information can help you understand your electricity usage habits and make informed decisions when choosing a power plan for your household.</p>
<p>Choose to request either:</p>
<ul>
  <li>a summarised report - the consumption data recorded on each of your bills, or</li>
  <li>a detailed report - the consumption data in its most detailed format</li>
</ul>
<p>The amount of data provided will depend on the period you are requesting for, the type of meter, and how often the meter was read, e.g. if you have a smart meter, your data may include 15-minute interval readings. We recommend requesting a summarised report due to the volume of information you could receive in a detailed report.</p>
<p><strong>Email </strong><a href="mailto:data.requests@pulseenergy.co.nz">data.requests@pulseenergy.co.nz</a><br /><strong>Phone </strong><a href="tel:0800785733">0800 785 733</a></p>46:T45e,data:image/png;base64,:T463,<p>Toast Electric is New Zealandâ€™s only not-for-profit electricity retailer. It services all households in the Wellington Electricity, Electra, PowerCo (Wairarapa) and Orion New Zealand networks (Wellington, Porirua, Hutt Valley, Kapiti, Horowhenua, Wairarapa, Christchurch and central Canterbury).</p>
<p><a href="https://sustaintrust.org.nz/">Sustainability Trust</a>, a Wellington-based charitable trust that has been warming up New Zealand homes and fighting energy hardship for over 20 years, operates Toast Electric.</p>
<p>Anyone can join Toast. Toast Electricâ€™s community-benefit model means that 100% of their profits support those living with low income, through their Energy Wellbeing programme. Customers on low incomes can be referred by partner agencies to this programme, which provides lower electricity tariffs, winter discounts and advice and support from the companyâ€™s assessors and partners.&nbsp;</p>
<p>As a not-for-profit organisation, Toast Electric has a focus on community benefit, social equity and ensuring low-income households are not left behind in the carbon and energy
